entries.name: Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
entries.definition: Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.

attributes.governor_essence: A Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by kuji kiri principles.
growth_paths: Through deepening Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts) understanding
Via practical application of spiritual principles
ethical_principles: Act in alignment with divine will
Serve the highest good of all beings
Maintain authentic spiritual authority
Honor the wisdom of Kuji-kiri (Nine Symbolic Cuts)
